CustomField.formula: IF( RecordType.DeveloperName == 'SO', Sales_Order__r.Expected_Date__c,if( RecordType.DeveloperName == 'Order', Order_S__r.Expected_Date__c, if( RecordType.DeveloperName == 'Work_Order', Work_Order__r.Expected_Date__c, IF( RecordType.DeveloperName == 'Purchase_Order', Purchase_Order__r.Expected_Date__c, IF( RecordType.DeveloperName == 'Transfer_Order', Transfer_Order__r.Expected_Date__c, IF( RecordType.DeveloperName == 'RMA', RMA__r.Expected_Date__c, Logistic_Expected_Date__c ) )))))
CustomField.label: Expected Date
